title: The Health Professions (Amendment) Act, 2021

sections.title: This Act may be cited as the Health Professions Shorttitle
sections.body:
(Amendment) Act, 2021, and shall be read as one with the
Health Professions Act, 2009, in this Act referred to as the ActNo.24
principalAct. of 2009
2. Section2oftheprincipalActis amendedbytheinsertion Amendment
ofsection2
of the following new definitions in the appropriate places in
alphabeticalorder:
“HigherEducationAuthority”means theHigher Education
Authority established under the Higher Education Act, Act No. 4 of
2013
2013;and
“Zambia Qualifications Authority” means the Zambia
Qualifications Authority established under the Zambia Act No. 13
of2011
QualificationsAuthorityAct,2011.
3. Section8oftheprincipalActis amendedbythedeletionof Amendment
of section8
subsection(7)andthesubstitutionthereforofthefollowing:
(7) The Minister may, by statutory instrument, on the
recommendation of the Council, prescribe the scope of practice
forhealthpractitionersregisteredunderthisAct.
SinglescopiesofthisActmaybeobtainedfromtheGovernmentPrinter,
